queries.question: What type of equipment do we have for each facility
queries.sql: SELECT Equipment.type  from Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment join Equipment on Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment.equipmentTypeId = Equipment.equipmentId join Maintenance_Facilities on Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment.maintenanceId = Maintenance_Facilities.id   GROUP BY Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment.equipmentTypeId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment.maintenanceId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Maintenance_Facilities)

queries.question: What type of equipment do we have for each facility
queries.sql: select maintenance_facilities.name , equipment.type from Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment join Equipment on Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment.equipmentTypeId = Equipment.equipmentId join Maintenance_Facilities on Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment.maintenanceId = Maintenance_Facilities.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?maintenance_facilities_equipment a :Maintenance_Facilities_Equipment .
  ?equipment a :Equipment .
  ?maintenance_facilities_equipment p:hasEquipment ?equipment .
  ?maintenance_facilities a :Maintenance_Facilities .
  ?maintenance_facilities_equipment p:hasMaintenance_Facilities ?maintenance_facilities .
  ?maintenance_facilities p:name ?name .
  ?equipment p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What type of equipment do we have for each facility
